data.description: The target for a spell like magic missile is a creature. For a spell like fireball, the target is a point in space where the ball of fire erupts. Most spells have ranges expressed in feet. Some spells target you or a creature you can touch. Other spells, such as the shield spell, only affect you. These have range indicating the origin point of the spell's effect (see 'Areas of Effect' later in this chapter).
